54:1: ٱ<tajweed class=qalaqah>قْ</tajweed>تَرَبَتِ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed>سَّاعَةُ وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=ikhafa>نش</tajweed>َقَّ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْقَمَرُ
